system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_chiphi_donhangtrang","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_CHIPHI_DONHANGTRANG
(
	@donhangtrang nvarchar(200),
	@tygia decimal(18,2)
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @donhangtrang nvarchar(200) = 'DQH-VFM04/0226'
	--DECLARE @tygia decimal(18,2) = 26000;
	DECLARE @tongtien_phoi decimal(18,2);
	DECLARE @tongsokhoi_phoi decimal(18,5);
	SELECT @tongtien_phoi = SUM(thanhtien), @tongsokhoi_phoi = SUM(sokhoi)
	FROM bg_donhang_chitiet
	WHERE dexuat_id IN (
		SELECT B.id FROM tr_dexuat_phoi A
		INNER JOIN tr_dexuat_phoi_chitiet B ON A.id = B.dexuat_id
		WHERE A.donhang = @donhangtrang AND A.IsCancel = 0 AND B.IsCancel = 0
	)


	CREATE TABLE #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG
	(
		maddh nvarchar(200) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI,
		donhang nvarchar(max) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI,
		masp nvarchar(200) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI,
		mahtr nvarchar(200) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI,
		soluong decimal(18,2),
		dongia decimal(18,2),
		dongia_ban decimal(18,2),
		loaitien nvarchar(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AI,
		tongsokhoi_phoi decimal(18,5),
		tongtien_phoi decimal(18,2),
		tongtien_ngukim decimal(18,2),
		tongtien_donggoi decimal(18,2),
		tongtien_son decimal(18,2),
		sokhoi_go decimal(18,5),
		sokhoi_van decimal(18,5)
	)

	INSERT INTO #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG (maddh, donhang, masp, mahtr, soluong, dongia, tongtien_phoi, tongsokhoi_phoi)
	SELECT A.maddh, A.donhang, B.masp, B.chitiet, SUM(B.soluong) AS soluong, 
		SUM(DISTINCT IIF(B.loaitien='USD',B.dongia * @tygia, B.dongia)) AS dongia, 
		@tongtien_phoi AS tongtien_phoi, @tongsokhoi_phoi AS tongsokhoi_phoi
	FROM tr_dondathang A
	INNER JOIN tr_dondathang_chitiet B ON A.maddh = B.maddh
	WHERE A.maddh = @donhangtrang
	GROUP BY A.maddh, A.donhang, B.masp, B.chitiet

	DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200), @soluong decimal(18,2);
	DECLARE @donhang_sudung nvarchar(max);
	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT masp, soluong, donhang FROM #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG
	OPEN CUR;
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @soluong, @donhang_sudung;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @sokhoi_go decimal(18,5), @sokhoi_van decimal(18,5);
		SET @sokhoi_go = 0;
		SET @sokhoi_van = 0;

		-- LẤY SỐ KHỐI GỖ VÀ VÁN
		SELECT @sokhoi_go = SUM(IIF(B.loainguyenlieu = 'GO', A.m3_tc, 0)), 
			@sokhoi_van = SUM(IIF(B.loainguyenlieu = 'VAN', A.m3_tc, 0))
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
		INNER JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva B ON A.id_nguyenlieu = B.id AND B.loainguyenlieu IN ('GO', 'VAN')
		WHERE A.masp = @masp

		-- LẤY ĐƠN GIÁ NGŨ KIM
		DECLARE @tongtien_ngukim decimal(18,2);
		SELECT @tongtien_ngukim = SUM(A.soluong * IIF(B.loaitien = 'USD', B.dongia * @tygia, B.dongia)) 
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		WHERE A.masp = @masp AND (A.HWforAI = 1 OR A.HWforPacking = 1)

		-- LẤY ĐƠN GIÁ ĐÓNG GÓI
		DECLARE @tongtien_donggoi decimal(18,2);
		SELECT @tongtien_donggoi = SUM(A.soluong * IIF(B.loaitien = 'USD', B.dongia * @tygia, B.dongia)) 
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.madonggoi = B.mavt
		WHERE A.masp = @masp

		-- lấy giá bán
		DECLARE @dongia_ban decimal(18, 2);
		SELECT @dongia_ban = AVG(A.price * @tygia) FROM tr_order_detail A
		WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.SplitWith_MultiDelimiter(@donhang_sudung, ',;')) AND A.item_number = @masp

		UPDATE #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG 
		SET sokhoi_go = @sokhoi_go * @soluong, 
			sokhoi_van = @sokhoi_van * @soluong,
			tongtien_ngukim = @tongtien_ngukim * @soluong,
			tongtien_donggoi = @tongtien_donggoi * @soluong,
			dongia_ban = @dongia_ban
		WHERE masp = @masp

		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @soluong, @donhang_sudung;
	END
	CLOSE CUR;
	DEALLOCATE CUR;

	SELECT @donhang_sudung = donhang FROM #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG;

	-- LẤY SỐ LƯỢNG XUẤT - SỐ LƯỢNG TRẢ VỀ THEO ĐƠN HÀNG
	DECLARE @tongtien_trahang decimal(18, 2), @tongtien_xuat decimal(18, 2), @tongtien_son decimal(18, 2);

	-- tổng tiền sơn sản xuất trả lại kho
	SELECT @tongtien_trahang = SUM(B.slnhap * C.dongia)
	FROM tr_phieunhap A
		INNER JOIN tr_ctphieunhap B ON A.sopn = B.sopn
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mavt = C.mavt
	WHERE A.RefType = 2012 AND A.makho = 'SON'
		AND A.active = 1 AND A.donhangsanxuat IS NOT NULL
		AND A.donhangsanxuat IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.SplitWith_MultiDelimiter(@donhang_sudung, ',;'))

	-- tổng tiền xuất vật tư cho đơn hàng
	SELECT @tongtien_xuat = SUM(B.soluong * c.dongia)
	FROM tr_phieuxuat A
		INNER JOIN tr_ctphieuxuat B ON A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
		INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mact = C.mavt
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.makho = 'SON'
		AND A.donhang IS NOT NULL
		AND A.donhang IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.SplitWith_MultiDelimiter(@donhang_sudung, ',;'))

	-- tổng tiền sơn sử dụng
	SET @tongtien_son = @tongtien_xuat - @tongtien_trahang
	UPDATE #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG SET tongtien_son = @tongtien_son;

	SELECT A.maddh, A.donhang, A.masp, A.mahtr, B.tensp, B.hehang,
		A.soluong, A.dongia, 
		thanhtien_hangtrang = A.dongia * A.soluong,
		A.dongia_ban,
		A.tongsokhoi_phoi, 
		A.tongtien_phoi,
		tongtien_ngukim = COALESCE(A.tongtien_ngukim, 0),
		tongtien_donggoi = COALESCE(A.tongtien_donggoi, 0),
		tongtien_son = COALESCE(A.tongtien_son, 0),
		tongchiphi = (A.dongia * A.soluong) + COALESCE(A.tongtien_ngukim, 0) + COALESCE(A.tongtien_donggoi, 0) + COALESCE(A.tongtien_son, 0),
		thanhtien_giaban = A.soluong * A.dongia_ban,
		A.sokhoi_go, A.sokhoi_van
	FROM #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG A
	LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp

	DROP TABLE #TEMP_DONHANGTRANG
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.bg_donhang_chitiet","dbo.cur","dbo.splitwith_multidelimiter","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_dexuat_phoi","dbo.tr_dexuat_phoi_chitiet","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
